title: Generate a GraphQL API for E-commerce Products
scenario: Create a GraphQL API for an e-commerce platform. The API should allow users to query products, categories, and orders. The API should also handle mutations for creating, updating, and deleting products, categories, and orders. The target output should be a GraphQL schema definition in SDL format. The output should be under 500 words and follow the standard GraphQL SDL syntax.
constraints: Must include query and mutation types for products, categories, and orders
Must use a schema definition language (SDL)

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the GraphQL schema follows the standard SDL syntax
Verify if the GraphQL API includes query and mutation types for products, categories, and orders, and uses a schema definition language (SDL)
Check if the GraphQL schema is clear and easy to read
